---
title: "Infrastructure"
---

{{< include /_common.qmd >}}

The online data storage and analysis platform has been designed for use of Centre for Safe Air 
members and affiliated researchers by nomination.

![](../images/about/CARDAT_infrastructure_overview_v2.png){fig-alt="CARDAT infrastructure overview"}

As per the above diagram, there are three aspects of this system:

- a cloud based data storage system [Cloud CARDAT][cardat-data-repo]
- a catalogue of available datasets [CAR Data Inventory](data_inventory/index.html)
- an online data analysis platform [CoESRA](https://coesra.tern.org.au/)
- [GitHub repository][cardat-gh] of workflows and tools

<!-- An overview of the CARDAT IT infrastructure can be seen in the [attached](files/IT_infrastructure_overview.pdf) overview document. -->

Access to these systems is administered through the [CARDAT Data management team][cardat-mail].
